productDisplayName: Red Tape Men's Black Slip-On Formal Shoe
description: Take casual dressing to the next level with these leather slip-ons from red tape. The clean design coupled with high quality materials makes this pair a great choice for everyday casual wear.  Team this with jeans and tees or shirts for a laid back look.Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Slightly distressed leather uppers for a rugged look Elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Stitch detailing for added style and reinforcement Padded collar for greater comfort Brand tab embossed on the tongue Midsole Padded footbed for all day comfort PU midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with zig-zag pattern on the forefoot and heel for greater grip Flex grooves for better flexibility Wash careRub surface with clean damp cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash
